title: NOVA 2.5 Task Registry
description: Derived projection of task state. NEVER edited directly. Generated by projection-builder from TASK_EVENTS.jsonl.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this registry file. Increment on breaking changes.

engine_version.description: Must match transitions.yaml engine_version. Mismatch = replay invalid.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp of last projection rebuild.

event_count.description: Number of events consumed to produce this projection. Used for consistency checks.

task_id.description: Task ID. Forks use single lowercase suffix: TASK-0042-a. Nested suffixes are FORBIDDEN.

implementation_lock.description: Exclusive lock held by the implementation or refactor agent.

review_lock.description: Exclusive lock held by the review or architect agent.

forked_from.description: Parent task ID when this task is a fork of an EXPIRED task.

fork_suffix.description: Single lowercase letter suffix for this fork (a-z). Null for original tasks.

pr_number.description: GitHub PR number currently associated with this task.

last_event_index.description: Index of the last TASK_EVENTS.jsonl event that changed this task's state.

priority_weight.description: Set by TASK_PRIORITY_SET events. Null means default (1.0). Higher values schedule the task sooner.

execution_cost.description: Set by TASK_PRIORITY_SET events. Null means default (1). Fibonacci scale: 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21. Scheduler divides the score by this value.

parent_idea.description: Idea that generated this task, when the task came from the Idea Factory layer.

architecture_id.description: Architecture artifact that generated this task.

module.description: Architecture module this generated task belongs to.

model.description: LLM model name (e.g. Claude 3.5 Sonnet, GPT-4 Turbo).

branch.description: Feature branch name. Null for REVIEW/ARCHITECT roles.

expires_at.description: Derived from claimed_at + TTL from transitions.yaml. Injected by projection builder.
